title: `podman manifest annotate --index` panics with `panic: runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1`
body:
### Issue Description

Annotate panics when trying to use it.

`podman version`
```text
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      5.3.1
API Version:  5.3.1
Go Version:   go1.23.3
Built:        Thu Nov 21 00:00:00 2024
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman run --platform linux/amd64 --rm -it quay.io/podman/stable:latest`
2. `podman manifest create asdf:asdf`
3. `podman manifest annotate --index asdf:asdf --annotation asdf=asdf`


### Describe the results you received

```text
panic: runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1
```
